Video.summary: Johnny's family hates his wife and his sister is here today to destroy his marriage. But, Johnny's wife isn't going quietly! Next Mitchell is here to confront his boyfriend about his boyfriend's decision to become a woman!
Video.title: The Springer Showdown

Video.summary: Jeda says that she's desperately in love with Steven. They were engaged until her sister Kayla stepped in and stole her man. Then, Ashley says that things in her life would be great if it wasn't for her boyfriend Phil's ex girlfriend Shanna.
Video.title: Sabotaged!

Video.summary: Mr. Panama is back and still cannot decide which girl he wants to be with. Next Chauntey is a transsexual who’s cheating with her lover's brother! Later Chris is back and he's still trying to play Dee and Rhonda at the same time.
Video.title: Unforgettable Guests Return

Video.summary: Lynne kicked her husband out for cheating and now he's living in her front yard in a box! Next Sam says he's always wanted to see 2 women sleep together so he made a peculiar agreement with his cousin.
Video.title: I Live In A Box!

Video.summary: Crystal has been sending explicit photos to her roommate's boyfriend; Kevin wants to give Jessica a dream wedding; Mario wants to confess.
Video.title: Fling Fall Outs

Video.summary: Kitten wants to tell her mother that she is a prostitute because her mother was neglectful and drove her to it. These two women face off over the lies. Next ... Even though Skat's ex-girlfriend is married, he believes he can win her back!
Video.title: Heartbreaking Secrets

Video.summary: They say you never forget your first time well these guests are here to live out their unforgettable first-time fantasies.
Video.title: First-Time Fantasies

Video.summary: Kassi is here because she can't believe that her ex-boyfriend left her for their roommate. Then it's a sister show down when these two go head to head for the love of the same man. Plus, Bryan's girlfriend Brandy is here to tell him a secret.
Video.title: Triple Ex!

Video.summary: Jen is going to tell John that she is dumping him for her secret lover, 73 year old Jerry. Next Danika has a little surprise for her fiancé which she feels compelled to tell him that she's really a man.
Video.title: Bizarre Love Affairs

Video.summary: Jennison is here to break up Scooter's marriage. Next Jana thinks her boyfriend is cheating, so she invited our cameras to join her when she confronted him at his home. A search of his house revealed another woman in the closet Jana's twin sister!
Video.title: Cheating Lovers Confess!

Video.summary: Fred deceived his lover, Jay, so now Jay is holding Fred gets revenge. Next Terry's obsession over his stuffed panda, Yogi, is about to drive his girlfriend out of his life! Then Benny will tell his buddy that he secretly wears women's underwear.
Video.title: Amazing Tales

Video.summary: Keisha's not only been disappointed with boyfriend Raymond's career choice selling DVD's on the street, but also his performance in bed. Then, not only did Desean cheat, he broke one of the sacred rules and slept with Dawntavia's best friend!
Video.title: Wild One Night Stands

Video.summary: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has lo reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.
Video.title: Weddings...Crashed!

Video.summary: Jeff met Chrissy during a beer robbery, but he never imagined she’d be sexually aggressive! Now he wants out! Shawn has to come clean to his fiancée Latisha after his one night stand! Tyrell is over Jill and ready to be with her godsister, Nicky!
Video.title: You're Not Leaving Me!

Video.summary: Dewight and Tiffany hit their breaking point when she learned he was cheating with her cousin Stacy! Pro cock fighter Johnny slept with Ashly and his girlfriend Ashley is steamed! Warren’s transsexual girlfriend has a big secret!
Video.title: Cheaters Confronted

Video.summary: Scotty says he feels like his girlfriend has a GPS on him 24/7; Giovanni blames his girlfriend for his infidelity; Winona wants to spice things up in the bedroom.
Video.title: Mistresses Reeled In

Video.summary: Zack and Cheyenne have differing hopes for their future; Nee Nee confronts the friend she thinks is trying to sabotage her relationship with her boyfriend; Stormi confesses to sleeping with her friend's man.
Video.title: Driven to Cheat

Video.summary: Barin's new girlfriend has a secret; Ericka disapproves of her sister's girlfriend; another man may ruin Tyler's wedding.
Video.title: My Big Gay Wedding

Video.summary: Josh wants to win back his ex, but his cheating ways resurface; Deja confronts her boyfriend about his indecent proposal to twin strippers; Misti learns that her boyfriend is cheating again.
Video.title: Hillbilly Heartbreak

Video.summary: Selina recently met Lee at the mall and while their love has blossomed, she's got a serious secret - she's really a man! Then D's visits to the local pool have gotten him into hot water after sleeping with the lifeguard.
Video.title: Transsexual Takedown

Video.summary: Rufus comes clean about cheating on Treynae and Rhonda tells her girlfriend that she’s having an affair!
Video.title: I Have Many Lovers

Video.summary: Michelle tells her lover that she’s really a man. Speedy fights to win his ex back from her new lover.
Video.title: I've Been Living a Lie

Video.summary: These viewers will duke it out with some outrageous guests: cheaters, tranny, and the Kung-Fu Hillbilly!
Video.title: Boxing Blowout: Viewers vs. Guests

Video.summary: Mary's busts her husband Bill in bed with her cousin, Elizabeth.
Video.title: Pregnant Sex Scandals!

Video.summary: Stephanie is married and pregnant, but she's not sure if the father is her husband or her boyfriend!
Video.title: I'm Here To Divorce You!

Video.summary: Tonya reveals some crazy secrets! Mike admits cheating with his fiancee's cousin! Jimmy has 2 dirty secrets!
Video.title: Baby I've Been Bad!

Video.summary: Torrance admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a transsexual. Then, Heather wants her boyfriend’s ex Tramisha to stop interfering with their relationship.
Video.title: Sizzling Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: Iris threw her husband, Wayne, out of the house during a fight, but she never expected he would find a new love so soon. She will confront her husband's new lover, Janie, a woman born with no hands and no feet.
Video.title: You Can't Tear Us Apart!

Video.summary: Steven and Tekla say their daughter-in-law Jamie is their retirement fund. Then, Patricia will reveal to her mom who introduced her to hooking!
Video.title: I'm Pimping My Daughter

Video.summary: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.
Video.title: Stay Out of My Threesome!

Video.summary: Susan is disgusted by her son Ron's incestual behavior with her niece, Tracy. But Ron insists that he is in love with Tracy and he will not let anyone get in the way of him marrying her.
Video.title: Kissin' Cousins

Video.summary: Gail needs more excitement in her life so shes been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next Dave finds out that his girlfriend of 3 years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back; even wear her bra!
Video.title: Freaky Sex Stories
